violations.text: The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by deceased insects too numerous to count observed during time of inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Hot water not available during time of inspection. PIC states hot water heater needs replacement. Establishment is using hot water from coffee machine for sanitation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025

Establishment does not have a dumpster. Adequate disposal units required to maintain volume of disposals. Heavy accumulation of trash observed in storage garage; foul odor also present. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
Floors in the basement were observed with an accumulation of small amounts of pooling water. The physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Baby Formula was observed held past sell by date. Formula was removed from retail sale to return to vendor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live insects observed during time of inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Establishment does not have a dumpster. Adequate disposal units required to maintain volume of disposals. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
Floors in the basement were observed with an accumulation of small amounts of pooling water. The physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The garage door located in the back receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Various foods displayed for sale were observed with mold on food within packaging. Food items that were unwholesome to sight were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Adulterated ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine was turned of and being actively cleaned during time of inspection. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Various ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety foods were observed past their use-by and sell-by dates. PIC disposed of foods that were past their use-by and sell-by dates at time of inspection. Foods available for credit from vendor were placed in milk crates in walk-in cooler and removed from sale with signage indicating return to vendor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Stored frozen food shall be maintained frozen. Per manufacturer's label, frozen entrees/ meals are to be kept frozen until use. Packaged frozen entrees/meals that were under refrigeration for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The garage door located in the back receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back is adjacent to the 3 bay sink. A splash guard shall be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back is adjacent to the 3 bay sink. A splash guard shall be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
The 3 bay sink area and bathroom are lacking a handwashing sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024

The hand-washing sinks were lacking paper towels. Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The 3 bay sink area is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back/storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
The floor in the dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The floors and walls at the back/storage area have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
